What We Do

Services

01

Full Detail Package

Complete interior and exterior detailing for a showroom-quality finish inside and out.

02

Interior Cleaning

Deep cleaning of seats, carpets, dashboard, and all interior surfaces.

03

Exterior Wash & Wax

Hand wash, clay bar treatment, and protective wax coating for lasting shine.

04

Ceramic Coating

Long-lasting ceramic protection that keeps your paint looking new for years.

05

Paint Correction

Remove swirl marks, scratches, and oxidation to restore your paint's original luster.

06

Engine Cleaning

Professional engine bay cleaning and dressing for a clean, well-maintained engine compartment.

About Us

12 Years of
Trusted Service

Since 2012, Nano's Car Detailing has been Columbus, Indiana's go-to destination for premium automotive care. As a family-owned business, we treat every vehicle like our own -- delivering meticulous results that keep our customers coming back.

We proudly serve our community in both English and Spanish, and we're honored to be BBB Accredited and a 2023 Readers' Choice Award winner. We also offer a 5% discount for seniors and military members.

12+
Years in Business
118+
Reviews
4.7
Star Rating

"Had my car ceramic coated here and the results are outstanding. Six months later it still beads water like day one. Highly recommend."

David K.

★★★★★

118+ Reviews on Yelp

Your Car Deserves
the Best.
